docs.title: Commands
docs.text:
• mkdocs new [dir-name] - Create a new project.
  • mkdocs serve - Start the live-reloading docs server.
  • mkdocs build - Build the documentation site.
  • mkdocs -h - Print help message and exit.

docs.title: Project layout
docs.text:
mkdocs.yml    # The configuration file.
docs/
    index.md  # The documentation homepage.
    ...       # Other markdown pages, images and other files.

docs.title: GUI
docs.text: This project includes a simple desktop GUI for running Monte Carlo simulations that compare battery configurations across varying mission conditions (payload, wind, temperature, etc.).

docs.title: What the GUI does
docs.text:
• Select nominal and extreme configurations
  • Set mission parameters (distance, cruise speed, safety margin)
  • Choose the number of Monte Carlo runs
  • Run simulations and view:
  • Summary statistics (success rate, average remaining energy, etc.)
  • Plots/visualizations produced by the simulation
  • Run an Extreme Conditions analysis (worst-case style runs) and review the results
